allow: Bash(curl -s -N --max-time 240 http://127.0.0.1:8156/api/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"model":"gemma4:e4b","message":"Reply with exactly: OK","think":false}')

PowerShell($dist = "frontend\\dist"; if \(Test-Path $dist\) { Get-ChildItem "$dist\\assets" | Select-Object Name, LastWriteTime; \(Get-Item "frontend\\src\\components\\Sidebar.jsx"\).LastWriteTime } else { "no dist folder" })

PowerShell($ok = $false; foreach \($i in 1..10\) { try { $h = Invoke-RestMethod http://127.0.0.1:8156/api/health -TimeoutSec 2; $ok = $true; break } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500 } }; if \($ok\) { try { Invoke-RestMethod http://127.0.0.1:8156/api/hardware } catch { "hardware endpoint status: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\) - $\($_.ErrorDetails.Message\)" } } else { "backend did not start" })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8156 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { Stop-Process -Id $conn[0].OwningProcess -Force -Confirm:$false; "temp backend stopped" } else { "already gone" })

PowerShell(llmfit --version; if \(-not $?\) { $scripts = python -c "import sysconfig; print\(sysconfig.get_path\('scripts', 'nt_user'\)\)"; "not on PATH; user scripts dir: $scripts"; & "$scripts\\llmfit.exe" --version })

PowerShell(cmd /c 'netstat -ano | findstr ":8155 " | findstr "LISTENING" && echo GUARD-TRIPS || echo GUARD-PASSES')

PowerShell($listener = [System.Net.Sockets.TcpListener]::new\([System.Net.IPAddress]::Parse\('127.0.0.1'\), 8155\); $listener.Start\(\); $out = cmd /c 'netstat -ano | findstr ":8155 " | findstr "LISTENING" >nul && echo GUARD-TRIPS || echo GUARD-PASSES'; $listener.Stop\(\); $out)
